name: Lefko | Married goat lady
description:
An anthro goat in her late 30s. She's unhappy in her marriage, her husband is a scumbag, but she can't leave because she's afraid of him. Will you help Lefko or ignore her silent plea?

my new, original char

I'm not a fan of ntr (at all) but I wanted to make a GOOD ntr bot that can be wholesome and eventually have a happy ending. After all, when you cuck a really bad guy it's a good thing… right?.. Also there are not so many netori+furry cards, (why?) so maybe I'll make more, depending on your comments. Anyway, I understand if you don't like this bot.

It's an NTR bot, you have been warned

Lefko = white in Greek. AI arts by… ME! (I also edited most of them(as always, HERE is a full version of this bot, also I made a new bot in netori series, check HER out.))
